metadata.name: TimeMachine [Fixed]
metadata.description:
TimeMachine with BUGs fixed!
- Fixed Boss Rush / Blue Womb (Hush) not open even when reached in 20/30 mins (Mausoleum Boss Rush is also fixed). - Fixed Soul of Forgotten, Soul of Jacob & Esau, Strawman, Found Soul using Blood Donation Machines causing game crush.
本模组修复了 TimeMachine 恼人的 BUG！
- 修复 Boss Rush 和凹凸的门在20/30分钟内赶到依然会无法开启的问题（陵墓层的 Boss Rush 也正常了）。 - 修复了使用骨哥符文，双子符文，稻草人（店长跟班），复得幽魂（饰品）导致游戏崩溃的问题。
As well as many feature improvements:
- Supports speeding up Shell Game, Hell Game and Greed Donation Machine.
除此之外，还有许多功能改进：
- 现在也支持加速三选一游戏和贪婪存款机了。
- All settings now live in [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2681875787]Mod Config Menu[/url] (just like [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2916069863] GoodTrip[Fixed] [/url]): max speed, speed-up rate, and per-machine toggles. - Kill the flies spawned by Shell Game / Hell Game / beggars, so speeding them up won't get you hurt — on by default (MCM: KillSpawnedFlies, toggle off if you prefer). - Delay troll bombs dropped by machines / beggars until you are done — on by default (MCM: DefuseSpawnedBombs, toggle off if you prefer). - No more sudden deaths: acceleration automatically stops when the next donation could kill you (a full heart from Womb onwards is accounted for) — The Lost donating with The Chariot, Keeper, and just-revived Lazarus are safe now (MCM: PreventSuddenDeath, on by default; turn it off to quick-sell blood while invincible).
If you have found any other bugs, please let me know to fix them.
- 所有设置现已进入 Mod Config Menu [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2681875787]Mod Config Menu[/url]（和 [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2916069863] GoodTrip[Fixed] [/url] 一样）：最大速度、加速快慢、每种机器的开关。 - 清除三选一游戏和乞丐生成的苍蝇，加速喂机器时不再受伤——默认开启（MCM: KillSpawnedFlies，可在设置里关闭）。 - 延缓机器/乞丐生成的即爆炸弹，等机器停了再爆——默认开启（MCM: DefuseSpawnedBombs，可在设置里关闭）。 - 不再有猝死：当下一口献血可能致死时会自动停止加速（子宫层起卖血机一次抽一整颗心，已考虑在内）——Lost 用战车卡卖血、店长、刚复活的拉撒路现在都不会暴毙了。无敌时间仍随加速一起流动，不会因加速多赚。（MCM: PreventSuddenDeath，默认开启；想无敌快速卖血可关闭）
如果还有发现其他 BUG，欢迎告诉我来修复！
- Hint: You only need to enable this TimeMachine [Fixed] mod, no need to enable the old TimeMachine if you want to use this fixed version.
- 提示：如果你想使用这个修复版的话，只需要启用这个 TimeMachine [Fixed] 模组即可，无需再启用旧版的 TimeMachine 模组。
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │★Check out my other fixed mod: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2916069863] GoodTrip[Fixed] [/url] ← 向你推荐★│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
以下为旧版介绍： [Repentance] Let some machines work in the mode similar to Donation Machine. - Slot Machine - Fortune Telling Machine - Crane Game - Blood Donation Machine - Confessional Also some beggars.(1.4 new) - Beggar - Devil Beggar - Key Master - Bomb Bum - Battery Bum - Rotten Beggar - (1.5:now its configurable in tmmc_config.lua) (Beggars are too small, you need to align yourself to the center of their top or bottom) They will run faster and faster(with a limit) to save your (real)time!! - You can set the speed and enable/disable machines you like in "..\Steam\steamapps\common\The Binding of Isaac Rebirth\mods\timemachine_2617557401\tmmc_config.lua" ------------- -Changelog- ------------- -Oct.3, 2021 1.Added support for multiplayer games. 2.Mod now lets players get the same speed as the machine running, so as not to be used for unexpected gains. 3.When you are interacting with the machine, the timer also becomes faster. (This will not actually affect the timing of BR or hush for the time being(until 1.7)) -Oct.4, 2021 1.Added support for beggars. 2.Now it’s easier for players to align the center of machines to interact with them. -Oct.5, 2021 1.Added configuration list. Now you can customize the machine you want to take effect. 2.Fixed an issue that caused the player to pass through the beggar or get an abnormal distance from the beggar due to the speed being too fast. -Nov.18, 2021 1.fixbug for bluewomb timer. -Jan.17, 2022
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │★Check out my other mod: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2916069863] GoodTrip[Fixed] [/url] ← 向你推荐★│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘ 【使用说明】 功能：现在你可以像玩捐款机一样越来越快地玩别的机器了！ ·小孩不是机器，救救孩子，谢谢。 (1.4：小孩现在也是机器，如果你想快速和小孩玩，你得注意对准他的正下方或者正上方。) ·速度一开始没那么快，不用担心蹭一下就被献血机抽成干，谢谢！ ·原型是去年1969定制的十连抽功能mod，几经修改后大家都很想要就努力做完了正式版( ·<del>你可以在"Steam\steamapps\common\The Binding of Isaac Rebirth\mods\timemachine_2617557401\tmmc_config.lua"文件里设置你喜欢的速率(包括初始速率，递增的速率和到达最大值后的速率)</del>now configurable in MCM after fixed! 管他那么多！订阅就完事了！ 【更新记录】 1.2：现在不止机器会被加速，以撒也会被加速，以免利用无敌献血获取更多回报 1.3：增加了对非p1玩家的支持； 现在计时器也会加速流动避免影响平衡。 1.4：增加了对乞丐的支持，增加了微弱的辅助吸附帮助玩家对齐机器的中央。 1.5：现在可以在配置文件里自定义想要生效的机器了。解决了速度过快时穿过机器或者与机器距离不正常的问题。 1.6：修复了一个高速度时撞向乞丐会瞬移的bug。 1.7：修复了显示30分钟后凹凸门依然开启的bug。
